ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "federation" TEXT /* Federation governing the league */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the league (e.g., top tier, second tier) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., grass, artificial) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was built */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium where the team plays */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team's manager */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the manager */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "matchday" INTEGER /* Matchday of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., FINISHED, PENDING) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the match (in Celsius) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the match (as a percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., H, A, D) */,
  "home_possession" REAL /* Home team's possession percentage */,
  "away_possession" REAL /* Away team's possession percentage */,
  "home_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the home team */,
  "away_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the away team */,
  "home_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the home team */,
  "away_shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player (in meters) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player (in kilograms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
